title: Filesystem truth review surfaces
summary: M5 file-bearing surfaces reuse one packet for watch-fidelity strips, ignore-resolution drawers, compare-first external-change review, and cross-root move review without inventing per-surface vocabulary.

watch_fidelity_strips.summary: Watch degraded for this notebook root.
detail_lines: Native watch is still attached, but rename pairing is incomplete on this root.
External-change timing and metadata-sensitive conflicts may arrive later than ordinary local edits.

actions.label: View implications
actions.outcome_summary: Opens the affected-guarantees detail list for this root.

actions.label: Retry watcher
actions.outcome_summary: Re-attempts full native watch registration for the notebook root.

actions.label: Inspect root details
actions.outcome_summary: Opens logical, canonical, and save-target detail for this root.

watch_fidelity_strips.summary: Remote watch fell back to polling.
detail_lines: Remote event streaming is unavailable, so change detection depends on the next polling cycle.
Compare-before-write remains the correctness floor before every remote save.

actions.label: Change interval
actions.outcome_summary: Adjusts the remote polling cadence when policy allows it.

actions.label: Retry native watch
actions.outcome_summary: Re-attempts the remote event stream.

actions.label: Continue editing
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps editing with compare-before-write protection active.

detail_lines: The container mount bridge can miss execute-bit and ownership changes between refreshes.
Generated preview output may lag until the next explicit refresh or compare.

actions.label: View implications
actions.outcome_summary: Shows which freshness and metadata guarantees are weaker on the container mount.

actions.label: Retry watcher
actions.outcome_summary: Re-initializes the container-side watch bridge.

actions.label: Inspect root details
actions.outcome_summary: Opens root authority, mount, and write-posture details.

watch_fidelity_strips.summary: Draft freshness depends on provider refresh.
detail_lines: This draft updates when the provider feed or generator refresh publishes a new revision.
Local chrome should not claim live external-change timing while the feed is throttled.

actions.label: Refresh now
actions.outcome_summary: Requests a provider-backed refresh for the generated draft.

actions.label: Open details
actions.outcome_summary: Opens source, provider, and save-posture details for this draft.

contributing_sources.summary: Hidden notebook checkpoints stay out of the default tree and quick-open results.
Notebook tooling treats transient checkpoints as support-only recovery data.

ignore_resolution_drawers.scope_impact: The checkpoint is absent from the default tree, but it can still be revealed for manual recovery.
ignore_resolution_drawers.summary: Checkpoint file is hidden by default notebook rules.
detail_lines: This row is hidden because it is a transient checkpoint, not a canonical notebook source.
Revealing it does not promote it to the authored save target.

actions.label: Reveal in context
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the checkpoint in the tree without changing the notebook's canonical target.

actions.label: Inspect ignore sources
actions.outcome_summary: Lists the hide rules that excluded the checkpoint.

contributing_sources.summary: The active API workset only loads the public request slice.
The current remote query excludes files outside the selected request scope.

ignore_resolution_drawers.scope_impact: The file exists on the remote root but is outside the current slice, so empty results must say scope-limited rather than missing.
ignore_resolution_drawers.summary: Result is outside the active remote request scope.
detail_lines: This path is not blocked; it is currently excluded by the selected request-workspace slice.
Expanding scope preserves remote authority cues before the file becomes editable.

actions.label: Expand scope
actions.outcome_summary: Loads the wider remote request slice before reopening the result.

actions.label: Reveal in context
actions.outcome_summary: Opens the scoped path with its remote-boundary cues intact.

contributing_sources.summary: Rendered preview cache files are derived output, not primary authored sources.
The workspace hides cache artifacts from ordinary navigation to prevent wrong-target edits.

ignore_resolution_drawers.scope_impact: The cache row is absent from default explorer and search views because preview output should route through the generated-source relation first.
ignore_resolution_drawers.summary: Generated overlay is hidden behind the preview source relation.
detail_lines: Opening the cache file directly would bypass the generated-source relation and portability notes.
Use the generated-source action when you need to inspect why the overlay exists.

actions.label: Open generated source
actions.outcome_summary: Opens the source-owned preview relation instead of the cache artifact.

actions.label: Inspect ignore sources
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the generated-overlay and workspace-hide rules.

contributing_sources.summary: Administrative policy narrows this provider-backed commentary row on the current tenant.

ignore_resolution_drawers.scope_impact: The row is hidden by policy, not by a user override, so reopening it requires policy detail rather than a local reveal toggle.
detail_lines: This path is excluded by an administrative rule on provider-backed generated content.
The draft remains editable where policy still admits the underlying authored source.

actions.label: Open policy details
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the policy reason and the owner of the next step.

external_change_reviews.identity_note: Same canonical target, opened through the authored notebook path.
external_change_reviews.diff_summary: Notebook cell metadata changed on disk after the buffer was staged.

metadata_delta_notes.summary: The notebook file now uses LF line endings, so a keep-local save would also preserve the staging buffer's normalized newline mode.

actions.label: Compare to disk
actions.outcome_summary: Opens the compare-first diff before any write is allowed.

actions.label: Reload
actions.outcome_summary: Replaces the local buffer with the current notebook bytes after review.

actions.label: Keep local
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps the local buffer open without writing over the newer on-disk notebook.

actions.label: Merge manually
actions.outcome_summary: Opens a manual merge flow for the notebook metadata drift.

actions.label: Save elsewhere
actions.outcome_summary: Preserves the local buffer to a different target without overwriting the canonical notebook.

detail_lines: This review is diff-first because the canonical notebook target changed after the local buffer staged.
A keep-local choice preserves the buffer state but does not claim the on-disk notebook still matches it.

external_change_reviews.identity_note: The presentation path still points at the same remote object id, but the provider revision advanced.
external_change_reviews.diff_summary: Remote request draft changed on revision rev-18.

metadata_delta_notes.summary: Remote compare-before-write must now target revision rev-18 rather than the staged rev-17 token.

actions.label: Compare to remote
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the rev-17 versus rev-18 diff before any conditional write.

actions.label: Reload
actions.outcome_summary: Adopts the current remote revision after review.

actions.label: Keep local
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps the local buffer staged without discarding the remote revision evidence.

actions.label: Merge manually
actions.outcome_summary: Lets the user reconcile the remote request delta into the local draft.

actions.label: Save elsewhere
actions.outcome_summary: Exports the local request body without overwriting the remote canonical target.

detail_lines: Remote conditional write safety depends on the provider revision, not only the visible path string.
Reload and keep-local remain distinct because the remote object is authoritative for the canonical target.

external_change_reviews.identity_note: Same rendered target, but the container generator published a newer render.
external_change_reviews.diff_summary: Rendered preview output refreshed in the container.

metadata_delta_notes.summary: The container-side artifact switched executable posture for an attached helper script.
The preview generator revision advanced, so the compare is tied to a new render identity.

actions.label: Compare to rendered output
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the rendered output diff before any local export or reload.

actions.label: Reload
actions.outcome_summary: Reloads the current rendered artifact from the container.

actions.label: Keep local
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps the local view state without claiming the rendered artifact is current.

actions.label: Merge manually
actions.outcome_summary: Lets the user inspect the generated diff before deciding how to export or copy.

actions.label: Save elsewhere
actions.outcome_summary: Copies the local artifact elsewhere without overwriting the generated target.

detail_lines: Rendered output is identity-aware: the compare notes the container generator revision as well as the visible file path.
The generated target should not be overwritten blindly just because the preview path matches.

external_change_reviews.identity_note: The visible draft label is stable, but the generated canonical draft id advanced with a provider sync.
external_change_reviews.diff_summary: Provider-backed draft refreshed to a newer generated revision.

metadata_delta_notes.summary: The generated draft id changed from 91 to 92, so the review must keep the logical draft and canonical target separate.

actions.label: Compare to draft source
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the previous and current provider-backed draft revisions.

actions.label: Reload
actions.outcome_summary: Adopts the latest generated draft revision.

actions.label: Keep local
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps the local draft buffer without claiming the generated revision stayed fixed.

actions.label: Merge manually
actions.outcome_summary: Manual merge is unavailable on this generated projection; reopen the authored source or save elsewhere.

actions.label: Save elsewhere
actions.outcome_summary: Writes the local draft copy to a new authored target instead of the provider-managed projection.

detail_lines: Generated drafts must disclose logical versus target identity before a user decides whether to reload or preserve a local copy.
The disabled manual-merge action remains visible so the surface does not imply a silent fallback path.

cross_root_move_reviews.case_sensitivity_note: Both roots preserve case, but the destination mount applies container ownership semantics.
cross_root_move_reviews.normalization_note: No Unicode normalization change is requested, but the target mount canonicalizes through the container path map.
cross_root_move_reviews.summary: This move crosses from a local authored root into a container-owned mount.
detail_lines: The operation is reviewed as copy then review rather than a hidden in-place rename.
Notebook permissions and ownership may differ once the file lands on the container mount.

actions.label: Preview plan
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the source, target, and metadata consequences before any copy occurs.

actions.label: Proceed
actions.outcome_summary: Stages the reviewed copy into the container target.

actions.label: Cancel
actions.outcome_summary: Cancels the cross-root move without changing either root.

cross_root_move_reviews.operation_label: Copy remote request draft to local workspace
cross_root_move_reviews.case_sensitivity_note: The local target preserves case, but the remote source remains revision-conditioned.
cross_root_move_reviews.normalization_note: Target naming is unchanged; the meaningful shift is authority, not Unicode spelling.
cross_root_move_reviews.summary: This transfer crosses from remote provider authority into a local authored file.
detail_lines: The remote object must keep its revision precondition even while the local copy is being prepared.
Deleting or replacing the remote source is a separate reviewed mutation, not part of this copy.

actions.label: Preview plan
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the remote revision, local target, and follow-up review posture.

actions.label: Save as copy
actions.outcome_summary: Creates the reviewed local copy while preserving the remote canonical source.

actions.label: Cancel
actions.outcome_summary: Cancels the transfer without mutating the remote object.

cross_root_move_reviews.operation_label: Copy rendered preview artifact out of container
cross_root_move_reviews.case_sensitivity_note: The local export path preserves case, but container ownership and execute posture may not round-trip exactly.
cross_root_move_reviews.normalization_note: No normalization change is requested; the risk is mount-boundary portability.
cross_root_move_reviews.summary: This operation crosses out of a container-backed generated output root.
detail_lines: The exported artifact may lose execute-bit or ownership metadata when it leaves the container root.
The generated container artifact remains the source of truth; the local export is a reviewed copy.

actions.label: Preview plan
actions.outcome_summary: Shows the export path and metadata changes before copying out of the container.

actions.label: Proceed
actions.outcome_summary: Creates the reviewed export copy.

actions.label: Cancel
actions.outcome_summary: Keeps the generated artifact in place and aborts the export.

cross_root_move_reviews.operation_label: Detach generated draft into local authored copy
cross_root_move_reviews.case_sensitivity_note: The target is an authored local file; future writes no longer inherit generated-draft refresh behavior.
cross_root_move_reviews.normalization_note: The path spelling change is ordinary; the meaningful change is detaching generated lineage.
cross_root_move_reviews.summary: This detach changes future write authority from generated draft to authored local file.
detail_lines: Detaching the draft creates a new authored target and ends provider-managed refresh for that copy.
The review keeps source lineage and the new local authority visible before proceed.

actions.label: Preview plan
actions.outcome_summary: Shows generated lineage, local destination, and post-detach write posture.

actions.label: Save as copy
actions.outcome_summary: Creates the local authored copy without mutating the generated source.

actions.label: Cancel
actions.outcome_summary: Cancels the detach and keeps the provider-backed draft authoritative.

scenarios.scenario: Local notebook editing shows degraded watch truth, a hidden checkpoint drawer, compare-first external-change review, and explicit copy-into-container review.
Remote request editing exposes polling fallback, scope-limited results, revision-aware external-change review, and remote-to-local copy review.
Container preview output stays explicit about reduced watch fidelity, generated-overlay absence, compare-first drift review, and copy-out consequences.
Generated provider drafts surface provider-refresh-only truth, policy-hidden commentary, identity-aware compare-first review, and lineage-detach copy review.
